description: Manage LinkedIn presence: drafts, publishing, brand voice, content intelligence, and engagement.

safeTools.name: CreateDraft
safeTools.description: Create a new LinkedIn post draft with text, visibility, and media settings.

safeTools.name: ListDrafts
safeTools.description: List all LinkedIn drafts, optionally filtered by status.

safeTools.name: GetDraft
safeTools.description: Get a single LinkedIn draft by ID.

safeTools.name: ApproveDraft
safeTools.description: Approve a LinkedIn draft for publishing.

safeTools.name: ScheduleDraft
safeTools.description: Schedule a draft for future publish.

safeTools.name: UnscheduleDraft
safeTools.description: Clear the scheduled time for a draft.

safeTools.name: GetAccountStatus
safeTools.description: Check LinkedIn connection status, profile, and permissions.

safeTools.name: GetVoice
safeTools.description: Get the brand voice profile for LinkedIn content.

safeTools.name: SetVoice
safeTools.description: Update the brand voice profile fields.

safeTools.name: PermissionProbe
safeTools.description: Check which LinkedIn operations are available based on granted scopes.

draftArtifactTools.name: GetDraftArtifact
draftArtifactTools.infinitivePhrase: to get a linkedin draft artifact
draftArtifactTools.description: Load the current LinkedIn draft artifact state including text, media, variants, and revision history.

draftArtifactTools.name: UpdateDraftText
draftArtifactTools.description: Replace the LinkedIn draft post text and add a revision entry.

draftArtifactTools.name: SetDraftMedia
draftArtifactTools.description: Attach a generated image to the draft artifact media. Stores image prompt, path, URL, and alt text.

draftArtifactTools.name: SetDraftVariants
draftArtifactTools.description: Store multiple candidate post variants on the draft artifact. Accepts a JSON array of variant objects.

draftArtifactTools.name: ApplyDraftVariant
draftArtifactTools.infinitivePhrase: to apply a linkedin draft variant
draftArtifactTools.description: Apply a selected variant to the draft post text and add a revision.

imageTools.name: GenerateImage
imageTools.description: Generate an image for a LinkedIn post using AI image generation.

highRiskTools.name: PublishDraft
highRiskTools.description: Publish an approved draft to LinkedIn. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: PublishDue
highRiskTools.description: Publish all approved, due drafts. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: CreatePost
highRiskTools.description: Direct publish a text post (bypasses draft workflow). Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: ShareLink
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to share a link on linkedin
highRiskTools.description: Direct share a link post. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: ShareImage
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to share an image on linkedin
highRiskTools.description: Direct share an image post. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: DeletePost
highRiskTools.description: Delete a published LinkedIn post. Destructive.

highRiskTools.name: DeleteDraft
highRiskTools.description: Delete a LinkedIn draft. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: ReplyComment
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to reply to a linkedin comment
highRiskTools.description: Reply to a comment on a LinkedIn post. Requires confirmation.

highRiskTools.name: GenerateContent
highRiskTools.description: Generate a LinkedIn post from a brief using LLM. Creates a local draft.

highRiskTools.name: PolishContent
highRiskTools.description: Polish existing text using LLM. Creates a local draft.

highRiskTools.name: OptimizeContent
highRiskTools.description: Optimize text for engagement using LLM. Creates a local draft.

highRiskTools.name: GenerateVariants
highRiskTools.description: Generate A/B test variants using LLM. Creates local drafts.

highRiskTools.name: RepurposeUrl
highRiskTools.infinitivePhrase: to repurpose a url for linkedin
highRiskTools.description: Fetch a URL and rewrite as a LinkedIn post. SSRF-protected.
